description: UCC-1 financing statement with debtor, secured party, and collateral text
parsed_text:
UCC FINANCING STATEMENT
Filing Type: Initial Financing Statement
Filing No.: IA-2026-0048127
Filing Date: March 16, 2026
Lapse Date: March 16, 2031
Filing Office: Iowa Secretary of State
Jurisdiction: Iowa
Debtor: Prairie Ridge Manufacturing LLC, 4100 Foundry Road, Des Moines, IA 50309
Secured Party: Heartland Bank, N.A., 200 Capital Avenue, Des Moines, IA 50309
Collateral: All equipment, machinery, inventory, accounts, general intangibles, instruments, chattel paper, deposit accounts, proceeds, products, accessions, replacements, and supporting obligations, whether now owned or hereafter acquired.
Fixture Filing: No
Transmitting Utility: No
Public Finance: No
Manufactured Home Transaction: No

expected_json.collateral_description: All equipment, machinery, inventory, accounts, general intangibles, instruments, chattel paper, deposit accounts, proceeds, products, accessions, replacements, and supporting obligations, whether now owned or hereafter acquired.
